finding_results.notes: Removed in-scene Imani entrance/action/dialogue and reassigned the food/reminder beat to Theo with off-page reference only.

Rewrote the post-boundary-violation voicemail with bodily stress markers (throat constriction, sweaty thumb, voice crack, bitten cheek), more compulsive language, and no tidy self-excusing closure line.
Added a concrete near-miss (lane breach plus horn blast and shoulder skid) and immediate corrective action (hazards, shoulder pull-over, brake pumping, breath reset) before continuing.
Kept the section to two voicemail attempts and introduced a new causal obstacle: Theo reports the Rifle lot collapsed, forcing a Glenwood reroute with lower/faster-risk pay assumptions.
Replaced the repeated 'landed like ...' metaphor template with a chapter-specific physiological/action response.

summary: Applied high/critical structural-craft revisions to chapter_07: resolved the Imani continuity mismatch, intensified the boundary-violation aftermath with embodied compulsion, added a concrete route/payment obstacle, replaced the repeated metaphor template, and strengthened the on-road danger beat with immediate corrective behavior while preserving chapter continuity and voice register.
